title: Capital Budgeting: A company is evaluating two projects. Project A has an...
summary: Compare two projects using NPV analysis to identify the value-maximizing choice.
prompt: A company is evaluating two projects. Project A has an NPV of $30,000, and Project B has an NPV of $25,000. If the cost of capital is 10%, which project should it choose?

options.text: The company should choose Project A as it has a higher NPV

solution: The company should choose Project A as it has a higher NPV, which indicates greater value creation.
